metric_definitions.bong_posterior_convergence_rate: How quickly per-buyer BONG posteriors narrow. Measured as entropy reduction per observation.
metric_definitions.diagnostic_hypothesis_distribution: Frequency of H1-H5 across all non-conversion outcomes. Healthy: no single hypothesis >50%.
metric_definitions.counterfactual_learning_multiplier: Total BONG updates / direct observations. Target: 2-4x. Higher = faster convergence.
metric_definitions.trilateral_epistemic_decomposition: % of exploration driven by buyer uncertainty vs page×mechanism uncertainty vs buyer×page uncertainty.
metric_definitions.propagation_multiplier_by_barrier: Ratio of propagated conversion lift to direct lift per barrier. >1.0 means correlation structure adds value.
metric_definitions.within_subject_icc: Intraclass correlation — how much of outcome variance is due to the person vs the intervention. High ICC = consistent person, design-effect discount applies.
metric_definitions.page_cluster_prescription_accuracy: % of touches where the prescribed page cluster matches the actual delivery. Measures StackAdapt targeting fidelity.
metric_definitions.information_value_bid_premium_avg: Average bid premium from information value. Should decrease over campaign lifetime as buyers get characterized.
metric_definitions.mechanism_probability_entropy: Shannon entropy of mechanism selection probabilities. High = uncertain selection (exploring). Low = confident (exploiting).

kpis.note: informativ_internal KPIs are computed by INFORMATIV's outcome handler and resonance learner. informativ_unified_system KPIs track the new BONG, DiagnosticReasoner, and counterfactual learning components.

reporting.informativ_hypothesis: Each subsequent touch should convert at a HIGHER rate than the previous. If touch N converts lower than touch N-1, the DiagnosticReasoner will identify WHY (H1-H5) and adapt the next touch accordingly.
unified_system_hypotheses: BONG correlated posteriors converge faster than independent Betas (measure: observations-to-80%-confidence)
Propagation-aware barrier targeting selects different (better) barriers than largest-gap in >20% of cases
Counterfactual learning multiplier reaches 2-4x by week 2
Trilateral epistemic page prescription produces higher engagement than population-default page targeting
Within-subject design-effect weight correctly discounts correlated observations (verify ICC estimation)
